articles.title: Antonelli fastest in Belgium FP2 ahead of Norris
articles.summary: Kimi Antonelli finished fastest in Free Practice 2 ahead of the Belgian Grand Prix, the Mercedes driver heading McLaren's Lando Norris and Red Bull's Max Verstappen.

articles.title: Why Red Bull has taken off its rotating rear wing
articles.summary: After crashes for Max Verstappen in Austria and Silverstone, Red Bull have decided to revert back to their previous rear wing.

articles.summary: Alpine's Pierre Gasly has conceded that Racing Bulls are a real threat to Alpine in Belgium and the Teams' Standings.
